item.title: HDFC AMC Q4 FY26: Profit Dips Despite Revenue Growth as Other Income Normalises
item.description: HDFC Asset Management Company Ltd., India's largest mutual fund house with assets under management of ₹7.5 lakh crores, reported a mixed performance for Q4 FY26, with net profit declining 19.07% quarter-on-quarter to ₹622.66 crores despite revenue advancing 16.66% year-on-year. The profit contraction was primarily driven by a sharp normalisation in other income, which fell from ₹159.29 crores in Q3 FY26 to just ₹11.55 crores in the March quarter. The stock, trading at ₹2,662.60 with a market capitalisation of ₹1,15,589 crores, has delivered a robust 28.63% return over the past year, significantly outperforming the Sensex's 1.23% gain. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Tejas Networks Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Tejas Networks Ltd's latest results are concerning, with a significant 82.55% year-on-year drop in net sales and a net loss of ₹211.34 crores, indicating severe operational challenges and a need for urgent strategic intervention. The company's financial metrics reflect a breakdown in its business model, raising doubts about its sustainability. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Rajputana Industries Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Rajputana Industries Ltd's latest results are positive, with a record net sales of ₹176.82 crores and a net profit of ₹3.00 crores, reflecting strong growth. However, rising interest expenses and debt management are critical challenges to watch for future performance. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Elecon Engineering Company Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Elecon Engineering Company Ltd's latest results show a significant net profit decline of 95.90% due to an extraordinary tax rate, despite a 35.14% sequential revenue recovery. While annual sales increased by 6.29% and the balance sheet remains strong, concerns about operational stability and margin compression persist. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are GTPL Hathway Ltd. latest results good or bad?
item.description: GTPL Hathway Ltd.'s latest results are concerning, showing a net loss of ₹15.02 crore and a significant decline in operating profit and margins, indicating serious operational challenges and a need for strategic management intervention. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Media Matrix Worldwide Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Media Matrix Worldwide Ltd's latest results show a 10.63% year-on-year revenue growth to ₹300.67 crores, but significant profitability challenges persist, with a net profit decline of 805% and a low operating margin of 1.80%, indicating ongoing operational inefficiencies and a deteriorating balance sheet. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Reliance Industrial Infrastructure Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Reliance Industrial Infrastructure Ltd's latest results are concerning, showing a 31.80% decline in net sales and ongoing operational challenges, despite a slight increase in net profit driven by non-operating income. The company continues to face negative margins and weak returns, indicating significant financial distress. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: ICICI Lombard's latest results show strong net profit growth of 40.93% year-on-year and a 10.81% increase in premium income, indicating healthy demand. However, a significant decline in operating margins raises concerns about operational efficiency, suggesting mixed overall performance. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: SG Finserve Q4 FY26: Stellar Growth Momentum Continues, But Valuation Concerns Linger
item.description: SG Finserve Ltd., a small-cap non-banking financial company specialising in supply chain financing solutions, delivered another quarter of exceptional growth in Q4 FY26, posting net profit of ₹42.27 crores—a robust 30.17% quarter-on-quarter increase and a remarkable 77.69% surge year-on-year. The company's stock surged 11.51% on April 16, 2026, closing at ₹517.65, as investors cheered the continued momentum in a company that has transformed from a negligible presence just five years ago into a ₹3,121 crore market capitalisation entity. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Gokul Agro Resources Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: The 50-day moving average for Gokul Agro Resources Ltd has crossed above the 200-day moving average, signalling a golden cross on 16 Apr 2026. Yet, this technically bullish event unfolds amid a complex backdrop of mixed momentum indicators and a small-cap profile, raising questions about the signal's reliability in isolation. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Golden Cross Forms in AYM Syntex Ltd — On a Day the Stock Fell 2.09%. What the Mixed Signals Mean
